case_title: JUANITA POLLARD VS. SELECT FURNITURE OUTLET LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLLARD, JUANITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELECT FURNITURE OUTLET LLC $2,044.14 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,044.14, DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF ARE ORDERED TO AGREE ON DATE AND TIME FOR DEFENDANT TO PICK UP FURNITURE FROM PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO BRING CASH/CASHIERS CHECK FOR $2,044.14. UPON RECEIPT, PLAINTIFF IS TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO REMOVE THE FURNITURE. ALTERNATIVELY, DEFENDANT MAY ELECT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2,044.14 AND LEAVE THE FURNITURE WITH PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT POLLARD, JUANITA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SELECT FURNITURE OUTLET LLC $2,044.14 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,044.14, **DEFENDANTS LIMITATION CLAUSE WAS NOT FOLLOWED FORCING PLAINTIFF TO HIRE A TRUCK TO RETURN THE ITEMS TO A STORE WHICH DEFENDANT ADMITTED WAS DIFFICULT TO ACCESS, IS AN EXTRA COST, AND WOULD VIOLATE #2 - NO EXTRA COST RETURNS IN 7-DAYS. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Select Furniture Outlet LLC, appears through Dan Brown; Respondent Juanita Pollard, appears in Pro Per. Parties previously stipulated to allow Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles to hear the case. Parties appear ready to have a judgment entered. Parties previously sworn summarize for Judge Myles the current status of the case, and respond to questions from him.
10:21am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence marked or retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Continued To Nov-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:30am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Select Furniture Outlet, LLC, appears through Dan Brownlow; Respondent, Juanita Pollard, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Matter is continued to Nov-05-09, 9:00am, to see if parties can resolve or dismiss the matter.
10:45am
Case submitted. No new evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Judgment Entered
